---
title: "P8106 Final Project SY3352"
author: "Su Yan"
date: "2026-05-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(patchwork) 
library(ggplot2) 
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(ranger)
library(gbm)
library(e1071)
library(kernlab)
library(pROC)
library(pdp)
library(vip)
library(gtsummary) 
```

# Data setup
```{r}
load("severity.RData")
set.seed(3352)
my_dat <- dat[sample(nrow(dat), 1000), ]
my_dat <- my_dat |> select(-id)

my_dat$severity <- factor(my_dat$severity, levels = c("1", "0"),
                          labels = c("severe", "not_severe"))
my_dat$gender <- factor(my_dat$gender, levels = c(0, 1),
                        labels = c("Female", "Male"))
my_dat$race <- factor(my_dat$race, levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
                      labels = c("White", "Asian", "Black", "Hispanic"))
my_dat$smoking <- factor(my_dat$smoking, levels = c(0, 1, 2),
                         labels = c("Never", "Former", "Current"))
my_dat$hypertension <- factor(my_dat$hypertension, levels = c(0, 1),
                              labels = c("No", "Yes"))
my_dat$diabetes <- factor(my_dat$diabetes, levels = c(0, 1), 
                          labels = c("No", "Yes"))
my_dat$vaccine <- factor(my_dat$vaccine, levels = c(0, 1),
                         labels = c("Unvaccinated", "Vaccinated"))

set.seed(3352)
data_split <- initial_split(my_dat, prop = 0.8, strata = severity)
training_data <- training(data_split)
testing_data <- testing(data_split)

table(training_data$severity)
table(testing_data$severity)
```

# EDA
```{r}
table_sum_stat <- my_dat |>
  tbl_summary( by = severity, include = -c(severity),
    statistic = list(all_continuous()  ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                     all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"),
    digits = all_continuous() ~ 1 ) |>
  add_p() |> add_overall() |> bold_labels()

table_sum_stat

# Figure 1: continuous predictors
featurePlot(x = training_data[, c("age", "height", "weight","bmi", "SBP", 
                                  "LDL", "depression")],
            y = training_data$severity, 
            scales = list(x = list(relation = "free"),
                          y = list(relation = "free")),
            plot = "box", pch = "|")

# Figure 2: categorical predictors
p1 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = gender, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Gender", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p2 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = race, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Race", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p3 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = smoking, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Smoking", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p4 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = hypertension, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Hypertension", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p5 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = diabetes, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Diabetes", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p6 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = vaccine, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Vaccination Status", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

(p1 + p2 + p3) / (p4 + p5 + p6) + plot_layout(guides = "collect") & 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")


```
